steps.code:
<?php
require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
update_option('blogname', 'Dublin Painter');
update_option('blogdescription', 'Professional Painting Services in Dublin');
update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/');
$pages = array('Home','Interior Painting','Exterior Painting','Commercial Painting','About Us','Gallery','Pricing','Contact','Get a Quote');
foreach ($pages as $title) {
  if (!get_page_by_title($title)) {
    wp_insert_post(array('post_title'=>$title,'post_status'=>'publish','post_type'=>'page','post_name'=>sanitize_title($title)));
  }
}
$home = get_page_by_title('Home');
if ($home) { update_option('show_on_front','page'); update_option('page_on_front',$home->ID); }
echo 'Done.';
